/usr/bin/g++ CMakeFiles/test_universal_buffer.dir/test/test_universal_buffer.cu.o -o test_universal_buffer  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ec2-user/git/ycj-blog-code/universal_buffer/build libuniversalbuffer.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart_static.a -ldl /usr/lib64/librt.a -lcublas -lgomp -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl  -L"/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs" -L"/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib"
